title: Expanded copper
description: Adds more vanilla uses for copper
body:
Ever thought copper should have more uses, but also thought that other mods that add more uses for copper stray too far from vanilla mechanics, well then this is the mod for you.

 

Expanded Copper adds more uses for copper, but keeps things vanilla friendly, adding some light redstone functionality and some decorational blocks.


Click the image below to be taken to [Bisect's website](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)
[![Bisect hosting partner link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e63eaa993f0d78f5f9c5f1658ad7f60cdff37f78_0.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)
 

Adds:

**Copper button**: oxidizable buttons with custom durations

**Copper pressure plate**: a pressure plate that will only detect dropped items

**Copper trapdoor**: oxidizable variant of the iron trapdoor for decoration purposes

**Copper door**: oxidizable variant of the iron door, usefull to spice up your entryway

**Copper bars**: oxidizable variant of iron bars to make your world seem just a little bit more steampunk

**Copper lantern**: a light source to liven up your mineshafts(comes with copper chains)
